dsl_rule.translation_notes: Long-Legged Doji identified by: (1) upper_wick and lower_wick both greater than ATR_14 indicating long wicks relative to volatility, (2) body_pct < 0.05 indicating minimal real body (close near open). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per source signal. Exit conditions use reversal logic (close beyond previous candle extremes) since author provided no specific exit guidance. Based on 51% bull market continuation rate and contextual nature of pattern, both long and short entries are valid depending on market context. Hold period set conservatively to 5 days given indecision nature of pattern.

source_rule_text: Long-Legged Doji: A candlestick pattern representing indecision between bulls and bears, with long upper and lower wicks and little to no real body
